body:
In a distributed scenario, `fill_halo_regions!` needs to know that we are passing a distributed grid. 
However, conversion removes the architecture, so we cannot convert in a distributed scenario. This should not be much of a problem since we are not really calling kernels in distributed fill halos, but MPI routines.

closes https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaOcean.jl/issues/655

We need tests for distributed sea ice and distributed coupled systems.
title: Fix distributed fill halos for dynamics

body: The checkpointer was not working for a `SeaIceModel`. This PR introduces it. However, it requires https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl/pull/4749 to work properly
title: Adapt the checkpointer to a `SeaIceModel`

body:
This PR avoids having to do always
```julia
using ClimaSeaIce
using ClimaSeaIce.SeaIceThermodynamics
using ClimaSeaIce.SeaIceDynamics
using ClimaSeaIce.Rheologies
```
title: Export useful types
